comment: Synthetic stage IIIA TNBC, female 43 premenopausal, cT3N1M0 (5.5 cm tumor + 2 axillary LN clinically positive), ER<1% / PR<1% / HER2 IHC 0, germline BRCA wild-type. Anchor: KEYNOTE-522 → pembrolizumab + carboplatin + paclitaxel (12 weeks) → pembrolizumab + AC (12 weeks) neoadjuvant, pCR ~64%. Engine drift: ALGO-BREAST-1L step 1 HER2-amp False → step 3 free-text 'ER<1% AND PR<1% (TNBC)' resolves False (no disease-scoped RF for TNBC subtype) → step 5 default → IND-BREAST-HR-POS-MET-1L-CDKI. The TNBC neoadj indication appears as an alternative track only. Anchor preserves intent; KB algo TNBC-subtype RF gap is logged for follow-up.
